creator: tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fix: 

+DEPRECATED=    Long out of date with multiple security issues.
+EXPIRATION_DATE=       2008-01-01
+
 CONFLICTS?=    openssh-portable-* openssh-gssapi-* ssh-1.* ssh2-3.*
 USE_OPENSSL=   yes
 WRKSRC=                ${WRKDIR}/ssh--KWT1LHZoHSXofE7qNX7B47xMbRltbknZ7p6WjazszMBYyzxk
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile
===================================================================

retrieving revision 1.134
diff -u -r1.134 Makefile
--- Makefile    20 Apr 2007 15:12:27 -0000      1.134
+++ Makefile    15 Nov 2007 16:46:02 -0000
@@ -22,6 +22,9 @@
 MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       OpenBSD's secure shell client and server (remote login program)
